summary: Engineering change order add backside constraint.
description: Engineering change order add backside constraint.
usage: ecoAddBacksideConstraint [-help] -embeddedFtvCells {list of cells} -net <netName> -topPreferredLayer <top-layer-name> [-groupTerms {{..} {..}} | -minimumFtvs ] [-loc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} [-bufOrient {R0 | R90 | R180 | R270 | MX | MX90 | MY | MY90}]]

options.name: -bufOrient
options.description: {R0 | R90 | R180 | R270 | MX | MX90 | MY | MY90} Specifies orientation(s) for FTV instance(s)

options.name: -embeddedFtvCells
options.description: Specifies names of FTVO and FTVI cells (one each)

options.name: -groupTerms
options.description: Specifies groups of terms with common FTV cell

options.name: -loc
options.description: {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} Specifies location(s) where FTV instance(s) will be placed

options.name: -minimumFtvs
options.description: Add one FTVO cell at driver term and one FTVI cell to drive all the sinks

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies name of the net on which FTV cells are to be added

options.name: -topPreferredLayer
options.description: Specifies name of the preferred top back-side layer
